message:
⚡ perf: pass prefetched mission via navigation state on import (#2908)

When clicking Import on a mission landing page, the mission is
already fetched and in React state. Instead of re-fetching it via
13-directory race lookup (~2s), pass it via React Router navigation
state so the sidebar can import it instantly.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
